tasks.title: Install LayerChart and configure CSS variables
tasks.description: FR-1: Install `layerchart@next` as a dependency. Add LayerChart CSS variables to the app's global stylesheet so chart theming inherits from the app's design tokens. Verify a minimal BarChart renders without errors.
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Write a minimal Svelte component that imports BarChart from layerchart and renders with hardcoded data — confirm it fails before install, passes after
Verify `pnpm add layerchart@next` completes without peer dependency errors
Add `.lc-root-container` CSS variables to global stylesheet mapping to app design tokens (--color-primary, --color-surface-*, --color-surface-content)
Create `src/lib/charts/index.ts` barrel export file (empty initially, will be populated in later tasks)
Task Logging: Log completion to tasks-log.json with task_id | title | summary | is_working | timestamp | notes | decisions_made
Code Review: Apply Karpathy Guidelines — no over-engineering, match existing style, minimal changes only
Update Docs: Note layerchart dependency in docs/research if needed

tasks.title: Define TypeScript types for chart config
tasks.description: FR-2: Create `src/lib/charts/types.ts` with BarChartConfig, BarChartData, FilterState, and supporting types. Export from index.ts.
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Write type-level tests or a test file that imports the types and creates valid/invalid configs — confirm type errors are caught
BarChartConfig includes: id, table, dimension ({ field, label? }), metric ({ field, label?, aggregate }), filters[], sortDirection, limit, clickToFilter, colors
BarChartData type: { [dimensionField]: string, value: number }
FilterState type: Map<string, Set<string>>
Types compile cleanly with `svelte-check`
Exported from `src/lib/charts/index.ts`
Task Logging: Log completion to tasks-log.json
Code Review: Types should be minimal — no fields beyond what the spec requires. No premature abstractions for future chart types.
Update Docs: No docs changes needed for types-only

tasks.title: Create DataModelconnector — SQL compilation and execution
tasks.description: FR-3: Create `src/lib/charts/engine/DataModel_connector.ts` with compileBarChartQuery() and executeBarChartQuery(). Compiles BarChartConfig + FilterState into DuckDB SQL, executes via existing executeQuery() from $lib/db-operations.
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Write test for compileBarChartQuery — given a simple config, assert the generated SQL string matches expected
TDD: Write test for compileBarChartQuery with active filters — assert WHERE clause is appended correctly
TDD: Write test for compileBarChartQuery with limit — assert LIMIT clause is present
TDD: Write test for executeBarChartQuery (integration) — executes against DuckDB and returns { rows: BarChartData[] }
compileBarChartQuery produces: SELECT {dim}, {agg}({metric}) as value FROM {table} [WHERE ...] GROUP BY {dim} ORDER BY value {dir} LIMIT {n}
Filter state generates: WHERE {dimension} IN ('val1', 'val2', ...)
Uses executeQuery() from `$lib/db-operations` — no direct Tauri invoke calls
Task Logging: Log completion to tasks-log.json
Code Review: No over-engineering. No caching layer. No connection pooling. Simple function that compiles and returns a string.
Update Docs: No docs changes needed

tasks.title: Create BarChartCanvas component — rendering and data flow
tasks.description: FR-4: Create `src/lib/charts/BarChartCanvas.svelte` — the main re-usable component. Props: config (BarChartConfig), height, width. Uses Svelte 5 runes for state management. Calls executeBarChartQuery on mount. Renders LayerChart BarChart.
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Write a test that mounts BarChartCanvas with a config and verifies it renders without errors
TDD: Write a test that verifies on mount, data is fetched and bars are rendered
Component accepts props via $props(): config (required), height (default 400), width (optional, responsive)
Uses $state for: data (BarChartData[]), filterState (FilterState), isLoading, error
Uses $effect for: fetch data on mount, re-fetch when filterState changes
Renders LayerChart <BarChart> with data, x accessor, y accessor, and basic tooltip
Shows loading state while fetching, error state on failure, 'No data' for empty results
Task Logging: Log completion to tasks-log.json
Code Review: Component should be ~100-150 lines. No premature extraction of sub-components. Match existing Svelte 5 patterns in the codebase.
Update Docs: Add BarChartCanvas to src/lib/charts/index.ts exports

tasks.title: Implement click-to-filter with visual dimming
tasks.description: FR-5: Inside BarChartCanvas, implement the click-to-filter interaction using LayerChart's onBarClick callback. Toggle categories in/out of selection. Dim unselected bars using a derived color map. Show filter chips with Clear All.
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Write test — click a bar → verify selectedCategories set contains the category
TDD: Write test — click same bar again → verify category removed from set
TDD: Write test — verify colorMap derived: selected = palette color, unselected = dimmed oklch
onBarClick handler extracts category from event detail and toggles it in selectedCategories
Derived colorMap maps each data category to either a palette color or 'oklch(0.85 0.01 250 / 0.4)'
Color map is applied via LayerChart's color scale or per-bar fill override
FilterChipBar renders above chart: each selected category as chip with × button, plus 'Clear all' button
When filterState changes, executeBarChartQuery is called with updated WHERE clause
Task Logging: Log completion to tasks-log.json
Code Review: Dim color should match the pattern from the draft (oklch with low chroma and alpha). No complex animation — just immediate color swap.
Update Docs: No docs changes needed

tasks.title: Add tooltip with value formatting
tasks.description: FR-6: Enable LayerChart's built-in tooltip on the bar chart. Use band mode (optimal for bar charts). Format values with locale-aware number formatting.
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Write test — verify tooltipContext is passed with mode: 'band'
TDD: Write test — verify value formatting function produces expected output for various number ranges
Pass tooltipContext={{ mode: 'band' }} to the BarChart component
Tooltip displays category as header and formatted value as item
Number formatting: values > 999 use toLocaleString(), consider abbreviation for very large numbers
Tooltip does not cause console errors or memory leaks
Task Logging: Log completion to tasks-log.json
Code Review: Use LayerChart's built-in Tooltip.Root/Tooltip.Header/Tooltip.Item components — no custom tooltip implementation unless necessary for formatting
Update Docs: No docs changes needed

tasks.title: Wire up on test route and verify end-to-end
tasks.description: FR-7: Create a test route (src/routes/charts/+page.svelte) that imports BarChartCanvas, defines a BarChartConfig pointing to an existing DuckDB table, and renders the chart. Verify all features work: data load, bar render, click-to-filter, tooltips, error states.
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Write a test that navigates to /charts and verifies the page renders without errors
Create src/routes/charts/+page.svelte with a BarChartCanvas configured against a real (or sample) table
BarChartConfig has sensible defaults: dimension auto-picked from first string column, metric from first numeric column, aggregate SUM, limit 30
Chart title is auto-generated: '{aggregate} of {metric} by {dimension}'
All interactive features work: click-to-filter, filter chips, clear all, tooltips
Error state renders correctly if table doesn't exist or query fails
Empty state renders correctly if table has 0 rows
Task Logging: Log completion to tasks-log.json
Code Review: Test route should be minimal — just the chart component with a config. No extra UI chrome beyond what's needed to verify.
Update Docs: Update docs/research/reusable-chart-architecture.md to note that Phase 1 core is implemented

tasks.title: Handle edge cases — empty data, single row, large categories, query errors
tasks.description: Verify and fix edge cases: 0 rows, 1 row, >50 categories, query errors, null values. Add guard clauses and fallback UI for each.
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Write test — config points to empty table → 'No data available' message shown, no crash
TDD: Write test — table with 1 row → single bar renders correctly
TDD: Write test — table with 100 distinct categories → chart renders with limit applied (default 30), no overflow
TDD: Write test — invalid table name → error state shown, no page crash
TDD: Write test — null/undefined values in metric column → filtered out or handled in aggregation
All edge cases tested and handled gracefully
Task Logging: Log completion to tasks-log.json
Code Review: Guard clauses should be simple if/return patterns. No complex error boundary abstractions.
Update Docs: Document known limitations in spec if any are discovered

rules: Write test first (RED) - test must fail
Write minimal code to pass (GREEN) - no optimization
Refactor only after test passes (REFACTOR) - maintain quality
All tasks must follow TDD cycle as acceptance criteria
